title: Studio Rose Bouquet Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Studio Rose Bouquet Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial studio portrait photography of an adult East Asian woman with long soft waves, luminous realistic skin with visible pores, natural confident expression, delicate eyeliner, separated lashes, soft pink blush, and glossy neutral lips. She wears an elegant ivory satin slip dress with delicate straps and an open-back suggestion. She stands in a professional photography studio, turning slightly over her shoulder toward the camera, holding a large bouquet of fresh deep red roses close to her body. wardrobe: elegant ivory satin slip dress with delicate straps and open-back suggestion. pose: standing in studio, turning over shoulder toward camera, bouquet held close. lighting: single large warm spotlight creating a circular projection behind her. adult subject: an adult East Asian woman with long soft waves, luminous realistic skin, natural confident expression.
imagePrompts.title: Rose Asian Woman White Satin

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic editorial studio portrait photography of an adult European man with medium-length dark blond hair, clean realistic skin texture, and a composed romantic expression. He wears a minimal black satin suit jacket over an open collar shirt. He turns over one shoulder toward the camera, chin lowered slightly, eyes meeting the lens, holding a deep red rose bouquet diagonally across his chest. Professional studio setting with a single large warm spotlight creating a circular light projection behind him, dramatic soft shadows, cinematic contrast, warm neutral tones, detailed rose petals and satin reflections. High-end fashion editorial finish, no logo, no watermark, no text, no celebrity likeness. adult subject: an adult European man with medium-length dark blond hair, clean skin texture, composed romantic expression. hero object: deep red rose bouquet held diagonally across the chest. pose: turning over one shoulder, chin lowered slightly, eyes toward camera. lighting: warm circular spotlight projection and dramatic soft shadow.
